_doc: Recovery rule self-test fixtures. Each category lists real-world stderr samples that MUST classify to it (positive), categories allowed to co-match legitimately (also_ok), and stderr that MUST NOT classify to it (negative). The harness asserts positives hit the target AND do not trip any undeclared category (anti-interference net). auto_recovery declares the expected auto action name for a given positive sample (by index), or null.
